title: Viridi Energy Brings First Company-Operated RNG Facility Online in Baldwin County, Alabama
content: Viridi Energy (â€œViridiâ€ or â€œthe firmâ€), a leading renewable natural gas (RNG) platform, today announced it has begun operations at its new RNG facility in Summerdale, Alabama. Developed in partnership with the Solid Waste Disposal Authority of Baldwin County, the facility captures landfill gas from the countyâ€™s Magnolia Landfill and converts it into pipeline-quality RNG, delivering environmental and economic benefits to the local community.
